Name: FLocalizedSubtitle
Description: A subtitle localized to a specific language.

Variables.Name: Subtitles
Variables.Description:
Subtitle cues.  If empty, use SoundNodeWave's SpokenText as the subtitle.  Will often be empty,
	  as the contents of the subtitle is commonly identical to what is spoken.

Variables.Name: bMature
Variables.Description: true if this sound is considered to contain mature content.

Variables.Name: bManualWordWrap
Variables.Description: true if the subtitles have been split manually.

Variables.Name: bSingleLine
Variables.Description: true if the subtitles should be displayed one line at a time.
